title: salsola divaricata
intro: Salsola divaricata, also known as Russian thistle or salsola, is a perennial weed plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Salsola divaricata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used in tinctures or capsules.
